GarzonDiegoFEUP nomad inl base Nevertheless after running the docker compose up d I get the following error nomad oasis app File opt venv lib python3 12 site packages nomad config models config py line 1127 in load plugin yaml nomad oasis app package path get package path python package nomad oasis app nomad oasis app File opt venv lib python3 12 site packages nomad common py line 43 in get package path nomad oasis app raise ValueError f The python package package name cannot be loaded e nomad oasis app ValueError The python package nomad inl base cannot be loaded AttributeError NoneType object has no attribute get filename Both the image and the plugin succeed the test in GitHub and the plugin was functional in my develop image so I am not sure why it s not working for this nomad image inl and I am not sure where to look for the mistakes or the mismatch PS I am also attaching the full logs file from docker compose so you can see everything Thank you in advance https github com GarzonDiegoFEUP nomad image inl blob main configs nomad yaml L31 L34 This is not needed anymore for new plugins that are part of the pyproject toml file if you delete those lines it should work I will try and let you know Thank you It worked perfectly Thank you so much perfect i just noticed that your readme is slightly behind the template at the moment unfortunately there was a typo in the readme instead of If the plugin is new you also need to add it under plugins in the nomad yaml config file that will be included it should have been If the plugin is not new you also need to add it under plugins in the nomad yaml config file that will be included which makes all the difference here

title: publishing data from a NOMAD-oasis
text: Dear developers I have some questions regarding publishing data from a NOMAD oasis We have a local NOMAD oasis installation different simulation and measurement data set for magnetic materials which are read via our own developed parsers many different file formats like txt json hdf5 nexus non nexus We need to publish our datasets on central NOMAD Is it possible to publish on the oasis without moving data to the central one possibility to test the publishing process How is this currently possible Publish it on local NOMAD than publishing on to central NOMAD The NOMAD documentation only states https nomad lab eu nomad lab nomad oasis html Publish selected data NOMAD Oasis will soon be connected to the public NOMAD service allowing you to publish selected data with one click Can one please point me into the right direction I we are also open for online meetings Thanks in advance BR Wilfried Crosslink to a related discussion Publishing an entry from Oasis to Central NOMAD https discord com channels REDACTED PHONE REDACTED PHONE Hi Wilfried Hortschitz We are having a bit of a intense time on our side due to the preparation of some important meetings and deadlines coming on our side Sorry if our responses come late At the moment the feature of shipping data from an Oasis with custom plugins to the central NOMAD is not fully covered meaning that the schemas will not be recognized as those plugins might not be installed in our central sevrice It is in our agenda to cover this but we are not fully there We have to have in mind that there will not be an immediate solution as this can get really hard and is nothing that we can get done in the next few weeks But it really is in our agenda I believe we have our first cases of publishing comp data from an Oasis to the central NOMAD but in this case both installations were sharing the same plugin relevant for that data Perhaps Lauri Himanen will be able to comment more about the progress Regarding the question about to publish in an Oasis Yes you can do that on your own risks and rules but to generate a DOI in those datasets you will need to configure your NOMAD installation to have a DOI provider https nomad lab eu prod v1 docs reference config html

title: publishing data from a NOMAD-oasis
text: the question about to publish in an Oasis Yes you can do that on your own risks and rules but to generate a DOI in those datasets you will need to configure your NOMAD installation to have a DOI provider https nomad lab eu prod v1 docs reference config html datacite Also I guess you will need to have your Oasis openly available not only on your intranet I am sorry if the answers from the relevant experts these days do not come super fast Busy days

title: pynxtools with config files - wrong way of passing the config file?
text: Hi guys I am using pynxtools with some personalized config file to parse some UPS data vms file and metadata eln into a nexus file Now it works in some environments and some not It seems to me that I have the same version of pynxtools and almost the same version of pynxtools xps in both environment More precisely I have pynxtools 0 7 4 in both and pynxtools xps 0 4 6 in the one that doesn t work and 0 4 6 post1 dev2 g81d414d d20241117 in the one that works The precise command I am using is convert str Data file str Setup ELN xps NXmpes Nexus file name config file r mypath config vms json If I execute that with the environment that has pynxtools xps 0 4 6 it seems to not recognize the config file option File C Users gorenfjf Anaconda3 lib site packages pynxtools xps reader utils py line 89 in parse file self raw data self parser parse file file kwargs TypeError parse file got an unexpected keyword argument config file Sorry maybe It s not a problem of pynxtools version it s just my first guess Anyway I don t know how to get now the 0 4 6 post1 dev2 g81d414d d20241117 version of pynxtools xps I assume that s one that has just been developed one for an example or something Is there now a better or different way to pass a config file Ok Small update The version of pynxtools xps was not the problem Now I reinstalled from my local copy of it and I still get the crash Depending on the reader you can also pass the config file as part of the files argument That s what I am doing with the mpes reader For the xps reader Lukas Pielsticker should know For the context I am trying to dock my app But my environment has so much history of things being installed re installed from here and there that it s really difficult to figure out what is needed and what is not That s why I was suspecting a version problem The config file option was introduced with the multi format reader and the corresponding changes to the XPS reader So yes you need a certain minimal version of both pynxtools and pynxtools xps for this to work Not sure which ones though

title: runing nomad dev distro taking ~3 min to load
text: Hi I m using the nomad dev distro but it really takes a while to load compared to the old way So after uv run poe start it takes 2 3 min for the application startup to complete it does work at the end though Is this normal or am I doing something wrong Hi Can you share some verbose logs uv run vv poe start Is it faster if you run uv run nomad admin run appworker Hi Ahmed So I tried with uv run vv poe start and this time it took 5 min Hi Ana I think one solution would be to reduce the number of plugins included By default we have included all of the plugins that are part of the central nomad system https github com FAIRmat NFDI nomad distro dev blob main pyproject toml L10 L27 but you can exclude which ever ones that are not relevant to your work The uv steps take very little time there one or two seconds The rest of the time is probably spent on intitializing the python stuff Although on my machine it takes 30 seconds for the whole thing to start but probably different hardware setup here I see thanks I will check how it goes reducing the plugins Yeah I was wondering if it s actually my laptop struggling p It could be a bit of both some of the plugins might have very big dependencies so it might take a little longer to initialize them

title: search widget showing more then 5 hits?
text: Hi is there a way to make a search term widget in an app to show more then 5 hits when using the text input box Sometimes we have more results and its hard to find them by just typing Changed the channel name search widget showing more then 5 hits Related to the original question above I was testing the use of filters There I can define the amount of entries that gets listed by options 10 Unfortunately the custom filter menu behaves differntly to the search widget and does not show suggestions when start typing in a string I could not find any hint in the docs if this is supported for Does onyone know Lauri Himanen Suggestions are not available for custom quantities but are collected for the shared quantities like entry name if so specified in their setup So Lab ID is a custom quantity no suggestions entry name is one of the quantities shared across schemas and it has been configured to collect suggestions suggestions are shown Thanks In the search widgets the suggestions work but not in the filter menu I also tested for entry name like MenuItemTerms search quantity entry name width 12 Should the suggestions work in the Filter Menu There was an issue with the suggestions that was fixed recently in develop The fix is also available in 1 3 14 which is released today
